languages.text: "Знатно им тут мозги прополоскало! Того и гляди — выть от злобы начнут".

traits.locale_text: "Знатно им тут мозги прополоскало! Того и гляди — выть от злобы начнут".
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

languages.text: "Their brains have been thoroughly scrambled here. They look like they might start howling with rage."
languages.original_text: "Знатно им тут мозги прополоскало! Того и гляди — выть от злобы начнут".

traits.locale_text: "Their minds have been thoroughly scrambled here. Any moment now, they'll be howling with rage."

languages.text: «Sus mentes están completamente revueltas. Parecen estar a punto de aullar de furia».
languages.original_text: "Their brains have been thoroughly scrambled here. They look like they might start howling with rage."

traits.locale_text: «Sus mentes están completamente revueltas. Parecen estar a punto de aullar de furia».

languages.text: “这些人的脑子已经彻底乱成一团了。我看他们随时都会暴怒咆哮起来。”
languages.original_text: "Their brains have been thoroughly scrambled here. They look like they might start howling with rage."

traits.locale_text: “这些人的脑子已经彻底乱成一团了。我看他们随时都会暴怒咆哮起来。”

languages.text: « Quelque chose a complètement perturbé leurs cerveaux. On dirait qu'ils sont sur le point de hurler de rage. »
languages.original_text: "Their brains have been thoroughly scrambled here. They look like they might start howling with rage."

traits.locale_text: « Quelque chose a complètement perturbé leurs cerveaux. On dirait qu'ils sont sur le point de hurler de rage. »

languages.text: "Beyinleri burada iyice püre olmuş. Her an öfkeyle ulumaya başlayacak gibiler."
languages.original_text: "Their brains have been thoroughly scrambled here. They look like they might start howling with rage."

traits.locale_text: "Beyinleri burada iyice püre olmuş. Her an öfkeyle ulumaya başlayacak gibiler."

languages.text: "Ihre Gehirne wurde ordentlich durchgeschüttelt. Sie sehen aus, als würden sie gleich vor Zorn aufheulen."
languages.original_text: "Their brains have been thoroughly scrambled here. They look like they might start howling with rage."

traits.locale_text: "Ihre Gehirne wurde ordentlich durchgeschüttelt. Sie sehen aus, als würden sie gleich vor Zorn aufheulen."

languages.text: 「彼らの頭は完全に混乱している。今にも怒り狂うだろう。」
